positive: A stylized cosmic whale breaching through a nebula-filled ocean. The whale should have intricate, bioluminescent markings that resemble constellations and galactic dust. The background nebula must feature deep indigo, vibrant magenta, electric cyan, and gold foil-effect gradients. Composition must be centered, emphasizing the curve of the whale's arch and the dynamic spray of luminous water. Style: Modern geometric etching mixed with fluid, high-contrast celestial watercolor. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the nebula, creating strong silhouettes and intense internal glows. Focus on clean edges and powerful contrast, suitable for a single-color screen print or vibrant DTG transfer.
negative: text, words, signature, watermark, logos, blurred, noise, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, ugly, poor quality, jpeg artifacts, blurry edges
